creator: theis@gmx.at
text:
Am 02.12.2012 09:40, schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of security/py-fail2ban,
>
> Please note that PR ports/174044 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/174044

Patch is OK

Thanks
Christoph
